name: Firey Hot Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to broil.
2. Place a baking rack about 6 inches from the heating element.
3. In a medium mixing bowl, combine the hot sauce, vegetable oil, white vinegar, and garlic powder.
4. Arrange chicken wings on the broiling pan.
5. Coat each wing thoroughly with the sauce mixture using a pastry brush.
6. Broil the wings for 7 minutes on one side.
7. Turn the wings over and continue broiling for another 7 minutes.
Alternatively, cook the wings over medium-high heat on a barbecue grill, preheating the grill and brushing it with oil to prevent sticking.
8. Serve hot, accompanied by celery sticks and Cool Cucumber Dip if desired.
